output.changes: Fixed double vertical padding by changing the container div's base padding from py-10 to py-16, matching the TestimonialsCarousel pattern. The section element has py-10 sm:py-16 for inter-block spacing, and the container now has py-16 md:py-24 for the inner padding within the charcoal background panel. Previously the container had py-10 at mobile which stacked with the section's py-10, creating 80px of combined padding. Now at mobile the section provides 40px outer spacing and the container provides 64px inner padding (appropriate for the charcoal panel).
output.testimonialsPattern: TestimonialsCarousel uses section py-10 sm:py-16 for outer block spacing, and container py-16 md:py-24 for inner content padding within the charcoal background pseudo-element. The section padding creates space between this block and adjacent blocks, while the container padding creates space inside the dark background panel. These do not visually stack because the section has bg-transparent and the charcoal background is rendered via a before pseudo-element on the container.
output.lintStatus: pre-existing errors only (none in DynamicContentCarousel files)

fixesApplied.change: Changed container div class from 'py-10 md:py-24' to 'py-16 md:py-24'
Changed container div className from 'py-10 md:py-24' to 'py-16 md:py-24'

syncStatus.note: PHP and TSX container classes are identical: 'container relative py-16 md:py-24 before:absolute before:bg-charcoal before:rounded-3xl before:-z-1 before:-inset-(--side-gutter) md:before:-inset-8'
